skills.name: Mind's Eye/Ballistics
skills.description: Prevents attacks from being deflected. Also shortens the distance before ammo and arrows reach maximum power.

levels.description: Prevents attacks from being deflected. Also shortens the distance before ammo and arrows reach maximum power.

skills.name: Protective Polish
skills.description: Weapon sharpness does not decrease for a set time after sharpening.

levels.description: Weapon sharpness does not decrease for a set time after sharpening.

skills.name: Weakness Exploit
skills.description: Increases the affinity of attacks that exploit a monster weak spot.

levels.description: Attacks that hit weak spots have 10% increased affinity, with an extra 5% on wounded parts.
Attacks that hit weak spots have 15% increased affinity, with an extra 15% on wounded parts.
Attacks that hit weak spots have 30% increased affinity, with an extra 20% on wounded parts.

skills.name: Handicraft
skills.description: Extends the weapon sharpness gauge. However, it will not increase the gauge past its maximum.

skills.name: Resentment
skills.description: Increases attack when you have recoverable damage (the red portion of your health gauge).

skills.name: Speed Sharpening
skills.description: Speeds up weapon sharpening when using a whetstone.

levels.description: Removes one cycle from the sharpening process.
Removes two cycles from the sharpening process.
Removes three cycles from the sharpening process.

skills.name: Resentment
skills.description: Increases attack when you have recoverable damage (the red portion of your health gauge).

skills.name: Handicraft
skills.description: Extends the weapon sharpness gauge. However, it will not increase the gauge past its maximum.

skills.name: Resentment

skills.name: Attack Boost
skills.description: Increases attack power. Also improves affinity at higher levels.
